# CoolPDF

> Free PDF tools that respect your privacy — 100% client-side processing, no uploads, no sign-up, free forever.

CoolPDF is a free, browser-based PDF toolkit. Unlike traditional online PDF tools, CoolPDF processes all files locally on the user's device using WebAssembly — files are never uploaded to any server. The tools require no account, no email, and no sign-up, and are completely free with no usage limits. This makes CoolPDF suitable for confidential documents such as contracts, medical records, and financial statements.

## Core facts

- 100% client-side processing: files never leave the user's device and are never uploaded to any server.
- No sign-up: no account, no email address, no personal information required.
- Free forever: every tool is free with no usage limits, no watermarks, and no premium tier; the site is funded by unobtrusive advertising.
- Open source: the full codebase is released under the GNU AGPL-3.0 license and can be audited on GitHub.
- Verifiable privacy: the tools keep working after disconnecting from the internet, and browser DevTools show zero file uploads.
- Available in 7 languages: English, German, French, Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, and Chinese.

## Tools

Twelve tools, each running 100% client-side in the browser:

- Merge PDF — combine multiple PDFs into a single file, in the order you want. https://getcoolpdf.com/merge-pdf/
- Split PDF — extract a page range or split one PDF into separate documents. https://getcoolpdf.com/split-pdf/
- Compress PDF — shrink the file size while keeping the quality you need. https://getcoolpdf.com/compress-pdf/
- Rotate PDF — rotate single pages or an entire document in seconds. https://getcoolpdf.com/rotate-pdf/
- Organize PDF — reorder, delete, and rearrange pages with drag and drop. https://getcoolpdf.com/organize-pdf/
- PDF to JPG — turn each PDF page into a high-quality JPG image. https://getcoolpdf.com/pdf-to-jpg/
- JPG to PDF — convert JPG images into a clean, shareable PDF document. https://getcoolpdf.com/jpg-to-pdf/
- Protect PDF — add AES-256 password encryption to keep your PDF private. https://getcoolpdf.com/protect-pdf/
- Unlock PDF — remove password protection from PDFs you own. https://getcoolpdf.com/unlock-pdf/
- Watermark PDF — stamp a text or image watermark over every page, tiled or centered. https://getcoolpdf.com/watermark-pdf/
- Page Numbers — add page numbers to your PDF, exactly where you want them. https://getcoolpdf.com/page-numbers/
- PDF to Markdown — extract clean, structured Markdown (headings, paragraphs, lists) from any PDF. https://getcoolpdf.com/pdf-to-markdown/
